coupon.source_phrase_block: This is a 50% discount to the Boston Harbor Islands for up to 4 people. Passes are good between May and October. Please see the island-specific schedule for the 2026 season below. Visit www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets to purchase advance tickets. Select the date, time, destination, and number of tickets. Enter the library's code in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply to receive the 50% discounted rate. Complete your transaction and bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry! Paul Pratt Memorial Library - Cohasset Code: HARBOR16 Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays Visit museum website for more information. The Butterfly Place
